prompt: Hero frame, 9:16 vertical mobile gameplay screenshot of Push'em All: minimalist 3D low-poly scene, sandy-green (#56a38b) rectangular platform floating over vibrant blue (#2a7dfa) water, a blue stickman player at center wielding a long horizontal extending stick sweeping a dense crowd of bright red (#e3001b) stickman enemies off the edge, red ragdolls mid-air splashing into the water, flat shading, soft sun shadow, native HUD: thin level progress timeline across the top, large white 'COMBO x12' multiplier text center-screen, small coin counter top-right, bold overlay text 'actually feels GOOD?' in white sans-serif near top third, bright contrasting colors, energetic competitive mood, authentic in-game Push'em All moment
